title: Specific Items Holding
description: This mod will allow you to change the holding of the item. The mod is intended as an assistant to the creation of maps and datapacks.
body:
![Specific Items Holding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27f74e1a598464ade896eea7d144228defc2a171.png)



# **What does this mod do?**

_The mod adds a new subcommand for the /item command. It looks like this:_
```
/item HoldingType <type>
```
↑ _This will change the holding for an item in the main hand_

```
/item HoldingType <type> <hand>
```
↑ _Same as above, but will allow you to customize your specific hand._

# **Why do I need this mod?**

_You will be able to customize item holdings for your own mod, datapack or map. My mod also allows you to customize items from other mods. As an example, see screenshots, I showed there how you can use the mod on the example of a lamp from my other mod._
